name: Web Browser Activity (EVTX sources)
description: Captures browser activity visible in Windows Event Logs. Note: Full browser history requires SQLite/ESE artifact analysis. EVTX sources cover: browser process creation (4688/Sysmon 1), outbound network connections (Sysmon 3), SmartScreen URL checks, and browser-triggered downloads. Correlate with Prefetch and WebCacheV01.dat for complete picture.
author: EventHawk (SANS/Microsoft/Sigma)

event_descriptions.4688: Process created — filter by NewProcessName containing chrome.exe/firefox.exe/msedge.exe etc. CommandLine may include --single-argument URL.
event_descriptions.1: Sysmon: Process created — Image path for browser executables. ParentImage shows what launched the browser (suspicious if not explorer.exe or taskbar).
event_descriptions.3: Sysmon: Network connection — filter by Image=browser executable. DestinationHostname reveals visited domains without full URL. DestinationPort 443=HTTPS, 80=HTTP.
event_descriptions.15: Sysmon: FileCreateStreamHash — Zone.Identifier ADS created on downloaded files. ZoneId=3 = Internet download. TargetFilename shows downloaded file path.
event_descriptions.22: Sysmon: DNSEvent — Image=browser shows DNS queries made by browser. QueryName = visited hostname.
